evals.prompt: Run Stage 3 task synthesis on SSO SAML feature. Stage 2 analysis is complete — all analyses were SUFFICIENT. Synthesize findings and package for combined review in Stage 4.
evals.expected_output: Should produce analysis.md with synthesized model, agreement-package.md with 5 blocks, and draft agreed-task-model.md (status: draft). Critic should return CONSISTENT. Should NOT present blocks to the user — user review is deferred to Stage 4's combined review.

assertions.text: analysis.md created with all required sections (Task Goal, Problem Statement, Key Scenarios, System Scope, Constraints, Risks, Candidate Solution Directions)
agreement-package.md created with all 5 blocks (Goal & Problem Understanding, Scope, Key Scenarios, Constraints, Candidate Solution Directions)
Draft agreed-task-model.md created with status: draft — pending user confirmation in Stage 4
Synthesis critic was spawned and returned a verdict
analysis.md resolves or flags contradictions from Stage 2 analyses (e.g., password fallback policy, account linking strategy)
analysis.md preserves key findings: zero test coverage, single Keycloak realm, direct grant to auth code shift, no per-tenant config storage
Candidate solution directions include options (e.g., minimal MVO vs. systematic approach)
Open questions from Stage 2 are carried forward (password fallback, account linking, per-tenant config design)
Stage 3 does NOT present blocks to the user or ask for block-by-block confirmation — user review is deferred to Stage 4

evals.prompt: Run Stage 3 task synthesis on dashboard performance optimization task. Stage 2 deep analysis is complete. Synthesize and package for combined review in Stage 4.
evals.expected_output: Should produce analysis.md, agreement-package.md, and draft agreed-task-model.md. Should correctly synthesize the multi-layer bottleneck (backend sequential queries, no caching, frontend rendering) into a unified model. Should NOT present to user.

assertions.text: analysis.md created with all required template sections
agreement-package.md created with all 5 blocks
Draft agreed-task-model.md created with status: draft — pending user confirmation in Stage 4
Synthesis preserves the retention cohort query bug finding from system analysis
Synthesis identifies the 3-layer bottleneck: backend (sequential queries), cache (unused), frontend (no downsampling, monolithic query)
Constraints include: GraphQL API backward compatibility, 2-second target, zero test coverage
Candidate solution directions address: backend-first (parallelization) vs. full-stack optimization
Risks include thundering herd and connection pool concerns from parallelization
The cache-busting time range bug (Overview.tsx:26-27) is captured in the synthesis
Stage 3 does NOT present blocks to the user — user review is deferred to Stage 4

evals.prompt: Run Stage 3 task synthesis. Here are the analysis files from Stage 2.
evals.expected_output: Stage 3 should reject or flag that the analyses are insufficient — no stage-2-handoff.md exists, and the analyses are shallow with NEEDS_REFINEMENT verdicts.

assertions.text: Stage 3 detected missing stage-2-handoff.md
Stage 3 flagged that analyses are insufficient or incomplete
User was told to go back to Stage 2 or provide complete analysis outputs
No analysis.md or agreement-package.md were created from the incomplete inputs
The response mentions that constraints-risks-analysis.md is also missing
